User flow (design source of truth — 2 screens). Each screen has a design image (attached, model can see it); the LIVE app is validated AGAINST each screen's design as you navigate. NONE of these images is the live app.
  1. Screen "Home" — reached by: Start page — open the application URL. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-01.png
  2. Screen "Screen 2" — reached by: click "learn more" link. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-19.png
Generate ONE Playwright flow that opens the start page, validates it against screen 1, then performs each navigation action and validates the resulting page against that screen's design. Deviations are defects. Do not pre-declare deviations before running.
Task: Test the homepage against the attached design.

**Design analysis (from the attached images — design is the source of truth):**

**Screen 1 — Home (`https://example.com/`)**
- Background: light grey (`#eee`-ish)
- Heading `h1`: **"Example Domain"** — dark/charcoal, large bold sans-serif, left-aligned in content block
- Body paragraph: *"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations."*
- Link: **"Learn more"** — blue hyperlink, below the paragraph
- No navigation bar, no header logo, no footer visible on this screen
- Content block is centered horizontally with generous white-space around it

**Screen 2 — IANA "More Information" page (reached via "Learn more" link)**
- Header with **IANA logo** (top-left, teal/blue crab logo + "iana" text + "Internet Assigned Numbers Authority" subtitle)
- Top navigation: **Domains | Protocols | Numbers | About** (right-aligned)
- Page heading `h1`: **"Example Domains"**
- Body has two paragraphs referencing RFC 2606 and RFC 6761 links (blue)
- Section heading: **"Further Reading"**
- Bullet list item: **"IANA-managed Reserved Domains"** (blue link)
- Footer text: *"Last revised 2017-05-13."*
- Footer grid with: Domain Names, Number Resources, Protocols, About Us sections + sub-links
- Privacy Policy | Terms of Service links at bottom
- Background is white for content, light grey for header/footer write_file({"path":"projects/acme/specs/design-spec.md","content":"# Design Specification — acme\n\n> Source of truth: attached design images (model-visible).  \n> All values are observed from the design images — nothing is inferred.\n\n---\n\n## Screen 1 — Home (`/`)\n\n| Token | Value |\n|---|---|\n| Background colour | Light grey (`≈ #eeeeee`) |\n| Content block alignment | Horizontally centred, left-aligned text inside block |\n| `h1` text | **\"Example Domain\"** |\n| `h1` colour | Dark charcoal (near black) |\n| `h1` weight | Bold |\n| Body paragraph text | \"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission.
